item.name: Insights

description.content: Retrieve performance metrics and analytics data for campaigns, ad sets, and ads.

item.name: Facebook Business Manager Get ad account insights

request.name: Facebook Business Manager Get ad account insights

description.content: Retrieves performance insights and analytics for the specified ad account. Supports date range filtering, breakdowns, and action breakdowns.

query.description: Comma-separated list of fields to include in the response. If omitted, default fields are returned.
JSON object specifying the date range with since and until fields in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Comma-separated list of breakdown dimensions such as age, gender, country, or placement.
Level of aggregation for results. Options include account, campaign, adset, or ad.
Number of days for each increment in the time range, or use monthly or all_days.

response.name: Invalid request parameters or malformed request body

info.name: Facebook Business Manager Facebook Marketing API

description.content:
Create and manage ad campaigns, analyze performance, and automate advertising workflows across Meta platforms. The Marketing API provides programmatic access to Facebook's advertising system, enabling businesses to create campaigns, ad sets, and ads, manage budgets and bidding strategies, define targeting audiences, and retrieve performance metrics.

Contact Support:
 Name: Meta Developer Support
